title: PSWG Addon: Star Wars Adventures EP I
description: A small addon that adds survival features to the Parzi's Galaxies Mod.
body:
An addon for Galaxies: Parzi's Star Wars Mod (PSWG) that bring survival features to the mod.

 

 

This addon was created to make the PSWG Galaxies mod playable in survival whilst it is in it's early stages. For more addons, see the PSWG project page!

 

 

 

CREDITS:
parzivail - Creator of Galaxies
itzcarzy - The original Mandalorian model from Legacy

Aleex#2462 - Builder of the Hoth Structures

 

 

SUMMARY Introducing "PSWG Adventures Episode 1" - A Stellar Star Wars Adventure! Dive into the ever-expansive universe of Parzi's Galaxies with the thrilling addon mod, "PSWG Adventures Episode 1," crafted by the talented modder, Trep. This exceptional addon breathes new life into the PSWG mod Galaxies, augmenting your Star Wars experience with a plethora of exciting features. Unveil the wonders of survival gameplay in a galaxy far, far away, especially designed for those eagerly awaiting the full release of the primary mod. The Adventures mod enhances your experience with an array of captivating elements, including: 🌌 X Wing Skins: Customize your X-Wings and embark on unforgettable journeys across the galaxy, all in your own style. 🌟 New Mobs and Varieties: Encounter a multitude of new and diverse mobs, each with its unique charm and challenge, adding depth and excitement to your adventures. 🚀 Extra Vehicles: Explore the stars in style with an expanded selection of vehicles at your disposal, making interstellar travel a breeze. 🛡️ Custom Armor: Suit up with customized armor, tailor-made to provide you with the utmost protection and flair as you face the perils of the cosmos. 💰 A Currency System: Immerse yourself further into the Star Wars universe with a dynamic currency system that adds an extra layer of immersion to your galactic escapades. 🌠 An Active Community: Join a thriving community of fellow Star Wars enthusiasts and modders, where you can share your experiences, seek advice, and celebrate your adventures together. 🌐 A Community Server: Engage in epic battles and embark on grand quests with others on the official community server, uniting players from all corners of the galaxy ip: swu.ferox.host And that's just the beginning! "PSWG Adventures Episode 1" offers much more to explore, so strap in, grab your lightsaber, and prepare for a journey like no other in the vast Star Wars universe. For more details and to start your epic adventure today, visit the official Curse Forge page: PSWG Adventures Episode 1 on Curse Forge. May the Force be with you as you venture forth into the galaxy with "PSWG Adventures Episode 1."
